name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to get access:

1. Tap "💳 Pay for access" on the menu
2. Enter your M-Pesa number
3. Confirm the payment on your phone
4. Get your invite link instantly

You can check your payment status anytime with "📋 Check payment".

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
